title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
